name: snowflake-provider
desc: IaC engine — YAML → Snowflake objects. plan · apply · export · validate. No state file.

name: snowflake-tools
desc: Local dev CLI — runner, AST parser, regression testing, readme generation.

name: pythia-monitor
desc: Native App — team-scoped Snowsight replicas, business visibility, cost guardrails.

name: snowflake-kit
desc: Pure Python — no Snowflake connection required. Importable in CI, UDFs, Streamlit, local scripts.

name: snowflake-kit-streamlit
desc: Requires streamlit — Streamlit in Snowflake UI components only.

name: snowflake-kit-snowpark
desc: Requires a Snowpark session — runs inside Snowflake only.

name: snowflake-kit-connect
desc: Requires external credentials — third-party connectors and integrations.

name: snowflake-kit-airflow
desc: Airflow integration — PythiaTaskSensor for cross-platform DAG orchestration.
